chunks.text: Technical Reports - 1968. Periodic Responses of Nonlinear Feedback Systems (M258) by A.R. Bergen and R.L. Franks. On the Convergence of Optimization Algorithms (M256) by E. Polak. Computer Programs for Certain Problems in Electric and Magnetic Fields and Electron Streams in Two-Dimensional Systems (M255) by R.A. Rao and K.A. Fox. The Estimation of Modes and Its Application to Pattern Classification (M254) by Michael W. Blasgen. CANDOFD (Computer Analysis of Networks With Design Orientation in the Frequency Domain) (M253) by Paul M. Russo.

CANINE (Computer Analysis of Networks via Inversion of Network Equations) (M252) by Paul M. Russo. CANDO (Computer Analysis of Networks With Design Orientation) (M251) by Paul M. Russo. Computer Studies of Temperature Compensation in Selective Amplifiers (M250) by William J. McCalla. Stability of a Nonlinear Time-Invariant Feedback System Under Almost Constant Factors (M249) by C.A. Desoer and M.Y. Wu. State Estimation of Power Systems (M248) by Antonio R. Zarate, G.E. Mauerberger and J.M. Smith.

Temperature Sensitivity of Integrated Oscillators (M247) by Richard F. Adams. On Stochastic Differential Equations Arising in State Estimation Problems (M246) by Frank P. Romeo, Jr. The Distribution of Intervals Between Zeros For a Stationary Gaussian Process (M245) by E. Wong. Non-adiabatic and Stochastic Mechanisms for Cyclotron Resonance Trapping and Heating in Mirror Geometries (M244) by Allan J. Lichtenberg, Marvin J. Schwartz and David T. Tuma. Monolithic Wideband Amplifiers (M243) by Bruce A. Wooley.

The Capacity of Classes of Unknown Channels (M242) by L.J. Forys and P.P. Varaiya. Existence of Saddle Points in Differential Games (M241) by P. Varaiya and J. Lin. Turbulent Heating and Compression Experiments in B.M.E. II (Berkeley Mirror Experiment II) (M240) by H. deKluvier. Fuzzy Algorithms (M236) by L.A. Zadeh. On the Removal of Ill Conditioning Effects In the Computation of Optimal Controls (M235) by E. Polak.
